# Vendored geb-mathlib provenance

- Source: https://github.com/rokopt/geb-mathlib.git
- Source commit: 5aad21329e2b0f1b4dc508b0104894e3f8701804
- Back-port patch: scripts/geb-mathlib-backport.patch (commit 39debc4d51661bc790a47a79049b4141a2cf0f5c)
